prompt_text: Gao Lingning, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, shown in close-up side profile occupying the right half of the frame; her eyes remain closed, eyelashes trembling slightly, lips pale and still, emotion tightly suppressed as if pierced by old pain but refusing to respond. Background is a dark wooden bedhead swallowed by shadow, with only a thin warm line of candlelight grazing her neck and nose bridge.
